candidates.comparison: compiled async TP (fuse_gemm_comms=True) vs non-compiled regular TP
candidates.c1_weak_oracle: yes — compare_two_settings does exact dict equality on generated output
candidates.c2_realistic_breakage: yes — async TP fuses gemm+comms changing accumulation order; compilation may select different kernels
candidates.c3_no_strong_contract: yes — Not Strong #5: async TP fused distributed compile-pass parity against unfused baseline; Not Strong #1: eager vs compile
candidates.code_snippet:
compare_two_settings(
    model_id,
    async_tp_args,
    tp_args,
    method="generate",
    force_v1_runner=True,
)
